text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ocean, clear blue skies—it's time for summer camp! This is the
perfect opportunity to get in some good training, so I'm feeling extra
pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The weather is so nice... Perfect for an afternoon nap on the beach.
But before that, I have one more lap to run, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bright is back to her usual self, but she seems to be enjoying the
summer camp, so our training is going well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well then, I shall leave the timing to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she comes back, I let her rest while I plan out our summer camp
training regimen. Up next is strength training in the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And after that is...
...ner? ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've been back for a while. Is something the matter? You seem like
you're drifting away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...That reminds me. Trainer, you stayed up late last night preparing
energy drinks for our training, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Riiight?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Then that settles it. Trainer, won't you accompany me to tonight's
festival?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
One of the employees at the summer dormitory spoke of it. They said
there would be a festival close by this evening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It seems many other Umamusume are headed there. So I was thinking
we could take it easy today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to finish up my work if I want to enjoy this festival tonight!
First, I have to figure out this training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My, you're organizing those documents even faster than before.
choice_data_list: Let's stop for a break now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a swift departure. Breaks are fine with me, but I do hope
Trainer is resting properly as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I must do my part as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun is already setting by the time I finish up the training regimen.
I've even managed to map out a route for tomorrow's run through the
forest.
choice_data_list: It's... already this late?! I need to hurry back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome back. Come along, I've saved a seat for you right next
to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I tell Bright about all the work I still have to do, she simply
looks at me and smiles.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, now... You just made it back, did you not? I've plenty of things
I'd like to talk about with you today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
During our break, I went looking for seashells on the shore with
Dober. And guess what? There was a purple sea slug...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Out in the ocean, I saw jellyfish floating dreamily about. I only
watched from the shore, but the sight was truly enchanting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly feel today's fatigue hit me all at once, and Bright's
soothing voice feels almost like a lullaby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't fall asleep yet. I still have so many documents to go
through...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I even saw a big cloud, bigger than a mountain. It looked so soft and
fluffy, like freshly whipped ice cream slowly melting away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, are you feeling sleepy? Go ahead, gently slip away into the
land of dreams.

text_block_list.name: Someone's Humming
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, hm-hm-hm, hm-hm-hmmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my dreams, I hear a gentle voice soothing my soul with a familiar
lullaby.

text_block_list.name: Someone's Humming
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm-hmmm... Hm-hm-hm, hm-hm-hmmm... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My, you've woken up already? You can rest for longer, if you'd like.
choice_data_list: Huh? When did I fall asleep?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I jump to my feet. When did I fall asleep on this couch in the lobby?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I still need to submit those documents, and there's that
festival I promised to go to. Suddenly, Bright speaks up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Those documents... They're meant for the staff here, right? I took the
time to ask if you could submit them tomorrow, and they said it was
okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As for the festival, we've no hurry to go, have we? After all, we still
have next year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps, I went too far? I only ended up derailing your original
plans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've done nothing that deserves your gratitude. I only acted as I
normally would, taking things nice and slowly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might've been overworking myself recently... Thanks to Bright lulling
me to sleep, I feel my energy coming back to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she hadn't helped me relax, then I probably would've ended up too
tired to even go to the festival.
choice_data_list:
Thanks to you, we managed to find our usual
pace again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Our usual pace... Yours, and mine, you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I see. Mhm. In the end... staying true to my laid-back self is how I
should be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My, look over there, Trainer. That carrot stir-fry stall is still open.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we arrive at the festival, things have mostly quieted
down, with many people gradually making their way home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Many of the stalls have already closed up, but you know what they
say, "Leftovers are a sign of good things to come."
choice_data_list: First time I've heard that one...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ah, young miss! Wanna try your luck in the raffle? There's only one try
left, and I'm lookin' to sell out, y'see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, and speaking of good leftovers... Teehee, I think I'll give this a
try.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, you're a winner! Here's your prize—a pretty brooch
for the pretty lady!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Teehee, thank you very much. I'm quite fond of this floral
design.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...You know, Trainer? You were right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Every flower has its spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, we continue enjoying the remainder of the festival. We
walk along slowly, leisurely, and at our own pace—a pace fit for the
two of us.
